ddls:
CREATE TABLE "icon_types" (
  "icon_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each icon type */,
  "icon_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the icon type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the icon type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icon_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "densities" (
  "density_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each density */,
  "density_name" TEXT /* Name of the density */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the density */,
  "pixel_ratio" REAL /* Pixel ratio for the density */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("density_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icon_sizes" (
  "icon_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each icon size */,
  "icon_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the icon type */,
  "density_id" INTEGER /* ID of the density */,
  "size_in_pixels" TEXT /* Size of the icon in pixels */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icon_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icon_sizes_icon_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("icon_type_id") REFERENCES icon_types ("icon_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icon_sizes_density_id FOREIGN KEY ("density_id") REFERENCES densities ("density_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "density_references" (
  "density_reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each density reference */,
  "density_id" INTEGER /* ID of the density */,
  "referenced_density_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referenced density */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("density_reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_density_references_referenced_density_id FOREIGN KEY ("referenced_density_id") REFERENCES densities ("density_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_density_references_density_id FOREIGN KEY ("density_id") REFERENCES densities ("density_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_icon_usage" (
  "project_icon_usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project icon usage */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "icon_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the icon type */,
  "density_id" INTEGER /* ID of the density */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the icon was used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_icon_usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_icon_usage_density_id FOREIGN KEY ("density_id") REFERENCES densities ("density_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_icon_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_icon_usage_icon_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("icon_type_id") REFERENCES icon_types ("icon_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user access */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "icon_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the icon type */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the icon type in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_icon_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("icon_type_id") REFERENCES icon_types ("icon_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "icon_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the icon type */,
  "density_id" INTEGER /* ID of the density */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_density_id FOREIGN KEY ("density_id") REFERENCES densities ("density_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_icon_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("icon_type_id") REFERENCES icon_types ("icon_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_logs" (
  "report_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report log */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icon_metadata" (
  "icon_metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each icon metadata */,
  "icon_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the icon size */,
  "icon_name" TEXT /* Name of the icon */,
  "icon_description" TEXT /* Description of the icon */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icon_metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icon_metadata_icon_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("icon_size_id") REFERENCES icon_sizes ("icon_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icon_upload_history" (
  "icon_upload_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each icon upload history */,
  "icon_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the icon size */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the icon */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the icon was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icon_upload_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icon_upload_history_icon_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("icon_size_id") REFERENCES icon_sizes ("icon_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icon_upload_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
